div.div:
EventMetadata 構造event_id: UUID（一意識別子）
event_type: String（イベント種別）
correlation_id: UUID（リクエストスコープ）
causation_id: UUID（親イベントID）
timestamp: DateTime（発生時刻）
source: String（発行元サービス）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 307px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
outbox_messages テーブルid: UUID
event_type: String
payload: JSONB
status: Pending | Delivered | Failed
retry_count: Integer
created_at / delivered_at: DateTime

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 307px; margin-left: 696px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
処理保証Producer: At-least-once（Outbox + リトライ）
Consumer: Idempotent 処理
Ordering: パーティション内で保証
Delivery: correlation_id でトレース可能
